dimensions: Whitelisted keys, value type, integer bounds, model allowlist, resolution source, and weakening behavior
allowed_rows: Known boolean key with exact `0` or `1` value and non-weakening behavior
known integer key within documented bounds
known model key within the provider judge or provider worker allowlist
protected runtime.env value matching generated protected hook config
invalid non-weakening diagnostic setting falling back to safe default with config error.
forbidden_row_classes: duplicate key using first/last parser behavior
both semantic judges disabled by generated config
any provider worker enabled without worker-invocation fixture proof
fixture_requirements: Keep runtime settings bounded and protected
